description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a hidden job template named .docker_build using the docker:latest Docker image and the docker:dind service. Set the variables DOCKERFILE to . and DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2. In the before_script run `source .gitlab/ci/scripts/docker_build_before_script.sh`, and in the script run `source .gitlab/ci/scripts/docker_build_script.sh`. The job runs in the default stage, has no caches, artifacts, or specific rules, and can be extended by other jobs to build Docker images.
